name: Vesuvius plc
description: Vesuvius plc is a British-based global leader in molten metal flow engineering and technology. The company specializes in the development, manufacture, and marketing of advanced ceramic consumable products and systems essential for the steel, foundry, glass, and solar energy industries. By providing critical solutions that improve production efficiency and quality, Vesuvius supports complex industrial processes worldwide. Headquartered in London and listed on the London Stock Exchange, the company operates a vast international network, delivering innovative engineering services that help its customers optimize their manufacturing performance while focusing on sustainability and technological advancement in high-temperature environments.
